uplink.description: standard report: temperature 29.53 C (cluster 0x0402 attr 0, cmd 0x0A)
uplink._note: Upstream example input (payload 110A04020000290B89). expected.data authored here; value 29.53 C confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable 'temperature' = 29.53).

uplink.description: read-attribute response: temperature 24.5 C (cluster 0x0402 attr 0, cmd 0x01, value at offset 8)
uplink._note: Upstream example input (payload 11010402000000290992). Exercises the cmd 0x01 read-response path where the status byte sits at index 6 and the value at index 8. Value 24.5 C confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: standard report: relative humidity 37.21 % (cluster 0x0405 attr 0, cmd 0x0A)
uplink._note: Upstream example input (payload 110A04050000210E89). expected.data authored here; value 37.21 % confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable 'humidity' = 37.21).

uplink.description: standard report: disposable battery 3.642 V (cluster 0x0050 attr 6, cmd 0x0A)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard-report input (payload 110A005000064105 03040E3A). Flags byte 0x04 selects the disposable-battery 2-byte mV source (0x0E3A = 3642 mV). Value confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable 'disposable_battery_voltage' = 3.642), mapped to battery (V).

uplink.description: standard report: case-tamper pin state asserted (cluster 0x000F attr 0x55, cmd 0x0A) -> caseViolation extra
uplink._note: Upstream example input (payload 110A000F00551001). The pin state is the case-tamper input; upstream names it 'violation_detection' (= true). Not a vocabulary measurement, surfaced as the camelCase extra caseViolation.

uplink.description: standard report: pulse-count input 0 (cluster 0x000F attr 0x0402, cmd 0x0A) -> pulseIndex extra
uplink._note: Upstream example input (payload 110A000F04022300000000). The 32-bit pulse counter; upstream names it 'index' (= 0). Not a vocabulary measurement, surfaced as the camelCase extra pulseIndex.

uplink.description: proprietary Huffman batch frame is out of scope -> error
uplink._note: Upstream example input (batch report carrying temperature/humidity/battery, payload 362100808098C31ECB824D7B07BA3D). Our codec rejects batch frames (frame-control byte 0x36 has bit0 clear); batch decoding is out of scope.
Synthetic: Watteco standard reports arrive on fPort 125; any other port is rejected.
